name: Perspective
tagline: Score comments for toxicity and harmful attributes
description: Analyze text with Google's Perspective Comment Analyzer and return probability scores for requested attributes such as toxicity, insults, or threats.

auth.hint: Enable Perspective API for a Google Cloud project and send its API key in the key query parameter.

tools.name: analyze_comment
tools.description: Analyze comment text and return overall and optional span-level scores for requested Perspective attributes.

params.name: comment
params.description: Comment TextEntry containing UTF-8 text and optional PLAIN_TEXT or HTML type.

params.name: requestedAttributes
params.description: Map of attribute names to score configuration, for example TOXICITY with an empty configuration object.

params.name: languages
params.description: ISO or BCP-47 languages; omit to request automatic language detection.

params.name: doNotStore
params.description: Request automatic deletion of submitted comment and context after scoring.

params.name: spanAnnotations
params.description: Request sub-comment span scores when supported by the selected model.
